title: digitaria breviglumis
intro: Digitaria breviglumis, also known as D. breviglumis or Digitaria breviglumis is a type of grass that is native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of D. breviglumis include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and fever. In herbal preparations, D. breviglumis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
